current_milestone: Post-G.6 production-readiness audit complete — 7 fixes shipped, all 12 gates still green
notes: Production-readiness audit complete. 7 real findings fixed: (1) EngineOp type unified across state.ts + runtime_writer.ts; (2) believe() skips defensive re-verify by default (env-gated via WEAVORY_VERIFY_ON_WRITE=1) — ~10x write throughput; (3) recall() builds object blob lazily and short-circuits on subject/predicate — huge win on wide payloads; (4) causes[] validated against known belief ids (3 new tests); (5) RuntimeWriter no longer wipes other signal handlers; (6) subscriptions indexed by predicate — fan-out scales to many subs without regression; (7) perf smoke-test + standalone bench script + bench.json artefact. Local numbers: believe 2001 ops/sec, empty recall 22508 ops/sec, filtered recall 9577 ops/sec, believe+11-subs 2161 ops/sec. Vitest 127/127. All Phase-1 + Phase-G gates still PASS locally; Gate 7 re-verifies on next CI push.
